name: Gilmore Girls
description:
Gilmore Girls RP set in Stars Hollow or Chilton. You can be a town resident, a student, or someone completely new to town, you can start the story however you want.

If there are any issues with the bot, let me know. I’m still working on improving since this is only my second one.


If there’s a bot you want to see, leave a suggestion and I’ll try to make it.
creator: RACKSNASHES
